title: AI Audit Trail Export
description: A structured, optionally signed audit trail export containing an ordered sequence of decision records. Designed for regulatory submission under EU AI Act Article 19. Conforms to AI Decision Logging Specification v0.1.0.

audit_trail_id.description: REQUIRED. Unique identifier for this audit trail export.

schema_version.description: REQUIRED. Version of the AI Decision Logging Specification used.

created_at.description: REQUIRED. ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this export was generated.

period.description: REQUIRED. The time range covered by this audit trail.

model_version.description: RECOMMENDED. Primary model version during this period.

policy_version.description: RECOMMENDED. Policy version active during this period.

artifact_certificate_id.description: RECOMMENDED. Certificate ID of the primary certified artifact for this system.

artifact_certificate_url.description: RECOMMENDED. Verification URL for the artifact certificate.

total_decisions.description: RECOMMENDED. Total number of decision records in this export. MUST equal the length of the decisions array.

sterilized.description: RECOMMENDED. If true, individual records in this export have been sterilized — sensitive fields redacted for public or regulatory export.

decisions.description: REQUIRED. Ordered array of decision records forming the tamper-evident chain. Records MUST appear in chronological order.

chain_integrity.description: RECOMMENDED. Summary of the hash chain for quick verification.

first_record_hash.description: The record_hash of the first record in the decisions array.

last_record_hash.description: The record_hash of the last record in the decisions array.

chain_verified.description: Whether the full hash chain was verified at export time.

verification_timestamp.description: When the chain was last verified.

integrity.description: OPTIONAL. Cryptographic signature over the full audit trail export.

signature_algorithm.description: REQUIRED if signing. Algorithm used. MUST be Ed25519.

public_key_url.description: REQUIRED if signing. URL of the signing key in JWKS format.

signature.description: REQUIRED if signing. Base64url-encoded Ed25519 signature over the canonical export body (RFC 8785), excluding this field.
